products.title: Organization Chart
products.description: An organizational chart shows the internal structure of an organization or company. The employees and positions are represented by boxes or other shapes, sometimes including photos, contact information, email and page links, icons, and illustrations. Straight or elbowed lines link the levels together.

products.title: New Joinee
products.description: A new employee who has recently joined an organization and is introduced through Microsoft's workplace tools for onboarding and collaboration. A New Joinee profile, onboarding information, and introduction are managed and shared within Microsoft workplace solutions to support onboarding, communication, and team integration.

products.title: Employee Directory
products.description: Employee Directory is a centralized digital directory containing employee details such as name, job title, department, contact information, and profile photo. It is managed through Microsoft workplace platforms to help employees quickly locate and connect with colleagues across the organization.

products.title: Calendar
products.description: Streamline your organization's schedule with an intelligent Calendar Portal built for modern enterprises. Manage events, meetings, holidays, and deadlines across teams with seamless collaboration.

products.title: Celebration
products.description: The Celebration Web Part displays upcoming employee birthdays and work anniversaries. Users can directly send wishes to employees.

products.title: Project Management Portal
products.description: Transform the way your organization plans, tracks, and delivers projects. A SharePoint-based Project Management Portal centralizes your PMO and gives every stakeholder visibility from task boards to executive dashboards.

products.title: Learning Management System
products.description: A Learning Management System helps organizations provide online training, courses, and learning materials to employees, students, or customers in a centralized system.

products.title: Audit System
products.description: The Audit System project in SharePoint Online is a centralized solution for managing audits and compliance. It streamlines record tracking, monitoring, and evaluation to improve transparency and accountability.

aiProjectServicesShowcaseData.subtitle: Enhancing Language Proficiency with AI
aiProjectServicesShowcaseData.description: Fluentify AI offers a comprehensive solution for enhancing language proficiency through data-driven insights and AI-powered assessments. It helps users improve spoken communication effectively for professionals, educators, and organizations.
features: Process MS Team, Zoom and Google Meet recording

services.title: AI or artificial intelligence
services.description: AI refers to the simulation of human intelligence in machines, enabling cognitive tasks. Azure OpenAI combines Microsoft Azure cloud capabilities with OpenAI models for advanced AI solutions.
